title: Internet thinks white light rising after meteor strike behind volcano is UFO. Scientist gives his verdict
description: A meteor exploded behind Mount Mayon volcano in the Philippines, just as it was erupting. At the same time, a white streak of light was seen rising in the sky. It appears to be a scene from a sci-fi thriller, with a UFO rising from a crash on Earth. However, that is not the truth.

title: ‘China’s Nostradamus’ issues stark proclamation over Trump UFO file release
description: An analyst known as “China’s Nostradamus” for his predictions about the future – including correctly warning about the current US-Iran conflict – has made a stark claim about the Trump administration’s disclosure of America’s UFO files. title: ‘China’s Nostradamus’ issues stark proclamation over Trump UFO file release
description: The futurist dubbed ‘China's Nostradamus' otherwise known as 'Professor Jiang' has delivered a damning reaction to Trump's UFO file declassification.

title: UFO expert issues warning over imminent Trump disclosure 'it's gone too far'
description: One investigator claims the slow drip of UAP disclosures is building towards a major moment for the public.
